name: Genesis Editor for Music and Sound (GEMS) v2.5

command_set.description: Trigger an FM/PSG patch with a MIDI-style note.
Set a specific voice parameter (ADSR, LFO, etc.).

behavioral_invariants.description: Hardware/software crash risk if more than 6 notes are active simultaneously in earlier versions.
0.1-0.5ms jitter between 68k commander and Z80 executor due to polling interaction.
Large banks of reused patches ('florentine', 'twangy') shared across multiple games.
